name: org.machanism.machai:assembly-maven-plugin
description: Assembly Maven Plugin (org.machanism.machai:assembly-maven-plugin) is a Maven plugin (packaging: maven-plugin) in the Machanism MachAI ecosystem that automates AI-assisted assembly of a target project directory (typically the Maven execution ${basedir}). It implements the Maven goal "assembly" via org.machanism.machai.assembly.maven.Assembly (a Maven AbstractMojo) and runs a two-phase workflow: (1) library recommendation using org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker, which takes a natural-language prompt read from a configurable file (property "assembly.prompt.file", default "project.txt") or collected interactively using org.codehaus.plexus.components.interactivity.Prompter, and returns recommended libraries as org.machanism.machai.schema.Bindex entries; recommendations are filtered by a configurable minimum score threshold (property "assembly.score", default 0.8 / ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_SCORE_VALUE) and can optionally use a remote registry endpoint for bindex metadata lookup/registration (property "bindex.register.url"); (2) project assembly using org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly, which applies changes to the project directory based on the prompt and selected Bindex entries. The plugin resolves GenAI provider identifiers for each phase independently: "assembly.genai" (ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME, default ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_MODEL, e.g., OpenAI:gpt-5) and "pick.genai" (Picker.MODEL_PROP_NAME, default Picker.DEFAULT_MODEL, e.g., OpenAI:gpt-5-mini), allowing a cheaper/faster model for recommendation and a stronger model for applying modifications. Typical usage is from Maven CLI or CI pipelines to drive metadata-based dependency/library selection and automated project scaffolding/packaging, guided by GenAI-powered semantic search over bindex metadata, with logging of recommended artifacts and their scores.

usageContext: Automated library recommendation and integration using bindex metadata

constructors.description: Creates a new Maven Mojo instance for the "assembly" goal. Configuration is injected via Maven @Parameter fields and system properties; at execution time the Mojo reads a natural-language assembly prompt from a file or via interactive prompting, runs a Picker phase to recommend libraries as Bindex entries, filters by a score threshold, then runs ApplicationAssembly to apply changes to the target project directory.

examples.description: Runs the "assembly" goal from the command line, configuring separate GenAI providers for picking and assembly, reading the prompt from project.txt, and requiring a minimum recommendation score of 0.8.

features.name: assembly
features.description: Implements the Maven "assembly" goal. Reads an assembly prompt from the configured file (property "assembly.prompt.file", default "project.txt") or requests it interactively using org.codehaus.plexus.components.interactivity.Prompter. Creates a configuration source backed by bindex.properties (org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator). Initializes org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker using the pick model property (Picker.MODEL_PROP_NAME / "pick.genai") and optional bindex.register.url, sets the score threshold (property "assembly.score", default ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_SCORE_VALUE), and calls picker.pick(query) to obtain recommended org.machanism.machai.schema.Bindex entries. Logs recommended library ids and their scores (via picker.getScore(id)); if no libraries are recommended, logs and exits. Then initializes org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly using the assembly model property (ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME / "assembly.genai") and runs assembly.assembly(query, bindexList) against the Maven basedir (project directory), applying AI-assisted changes. Wraps IO and prompting errors into MojoExecutionException.

examples.description: Runs the plugin goal with explicit providers for picking and assembly, reads the prompt from project.txt, and filters recommendations with score >= 0.8.
If the prompt file does not exist, the Mojo requests the prompt interactively from the user using the Maven/plexus prompter.
Runs the picker with an optional registration/lookup endpoint to resolve or register bindex metadata during library recommendation.

customizations.name: assembly.genai
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter selecting the GenAI provider id for the assembly phase (used to apply changes to the project). Bound to ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME; default is ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_MODEL (documented as OpenAI:gpt-5).

examples.description: Sets the GenAI provider used for the assembly phase.

customizations.name: pick.genai
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter selecting the GenAI provider id for the picker phase (used to recommend candidate libraries as Bindex entries). Bound to Picker.MODEL_PROP_NAME; default is Picker.DEFAULT_MODEL (documented as OpenAI:gpt-5-mini).

examples.description: Sets the GenAI provider used for the recommendation (picker) phase.

customizations.name: assembly.prompt.file
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter specifying the text file that contains the natural-language assembly prompt. If the file does not exist, the prompt is requested interactively via org.codehaus.plexus.components.interactivity.Prompter. Default: project.txt.

examples.description: Reads the assembly prompt from project.txt.

customizations.name: assembly.score
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter specifying the minimum score threshold for recommended libraries produced by org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker. Default: 0.8 (ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_SCORE_VALUE).

examples.description: Requires recommendations to have a score of at least 0.95.

customizations.name: bindex.register.url
customizations.description: Optional system property / plugin configuration parameter providing a registration/lookup endpoint used by org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker to look up and/or register bindex metadata during the recommendation phase.

examples.description: Configures the picker to use a remote registry endpoint for bindex metadata lookup/registration.
Command-line invocation configuring both phases and using a prompt file.
Example Maven POM configuration providing parameters via plugin configuration.
